revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (ja:アメノウズメ, en:Ame-no-Uzume); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text: {{talk page header}} == Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:25, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-25, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/79370226 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:25, 25 February 2026 (UTC) {{Tmbox|text= *{{Find sources}} *{{Find sources|アメノウズメノミコト}} *{{Find sources|天鈿女命}} *{{Find sources|天宇受賣命}} }} == 「日本最古のコメディアン」について == 最古の踊子という表現はよく見ますが、コメディアンというのは初めて見ました。少々無理があるのではないでしょうか？ "神懸かって舞った"ようなので、"笑いをとろうとした"のではなさそうです。その踊る姿に喝采が贈られ、"祭り（宴会？）の喧噪"に天照大神がさそわれたのではないかと。[[利用者:202.217.10.181|202.217.10.181]] 01:18 2003年3月19日 (UTC) :なるほど。そうかもしれません。思ったとおりに直しといてください。よろしくです。[[利用者:Sutou|Sutou]] 04:08 2003年3月19日 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:25, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-25, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1319507372 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:25, 25 February 2026 (UTC) {{WikiProject banner shell|class=C|1= {{WikiProject Japan|myth=yes|shinto=yes|importance=mid}} {{WikiProject Mythology|importance=mid}} {{WikiProject Women's History|importance=low}} {{WikiProject Women in Religion|importance=low}} }} ==Issues with Description== "The clever Ama-no-Uzume overturned a tub near the cave entrance and began a wild, sexual dance on it, tearing off her clothing in front of the male deities. They considered this so comical that they laughed heartily at the sight. Amaterasu heard them, and asked Ama-no-Uzume what was going on. The dawn goddess replied that the gods had found a better lover than her" I wonder if this is not a bit too much personal embellishment upon the original tale? It seems to over-eroticise the matter, especially as I cannot find any reference to the last sentence, in which it is implied that Ameterasu was a lover to the gods, nor any evidence that Ame-no-Uzume made any such quip. -- [[User:Hidoshi|Hidoshi]] 19:15, 28 September 2005 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:25, 25 February 2026 (UTC) ==Alternate Names== Okame seems to be the name Uzume takes in some theatrical contexts; see [http://www.mfashop.com/533442.html] I have added this reference. --[[User:206.132.50.221|206.132.50.221]] 02:17, 31 December 2006 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:25, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == A striptease?== Would Ame no Uzume's dance qualify as a [[striptease]]? [[Special:Contributions/192.12.88.7|192.12.88.7]] ([[User talk:192.12.88.7|talk]]) 06:48, 12 June 2009 (UTC) :The stripping is there but I see no evidence that it was a "tease" in the form of gradually removing clothes. [[Special:Contributions/192.12.88.7|192.12.88.7]] ([[User talk:192.12.88.7|talk]]) 06:50, 12 June 2009 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:25, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == External links modified == Hello fellow Wikipedians, I have just modified 2 external links on [[Ame-no-Uzume-no-Mikoto]]. Please take a moment to review [[special:diff/814861867|my edit]]. If you have any questions, or need the bot to ignore the links, or the page altogether, please visit [[User:Cyberpower678/FaQs#InternetArchiveBot|this simple FaQ]] for additional information. I made the following changes: *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20140102190934/http://www.city.hamada.shimane.jp/en/kagura/iwato.html to http://www.city.hamada.shimane.jp/en/kagura/iwato.html *Added {{tlx|dead link}} tag to http://www.tsubakishrine.org/contact/TsubakiKoApplication2.pdf *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20041206223721/http://www.nami.it/Glos/AmenoUzume.htm to http://www.nami.it/Glos/AmenoUzume.htm When you have finished reviewing my changes, you may follow the instructions on the template below to fix any issues with the URLs. {{sourcecheck|checked=false|needhelp=}} Cheers.—[[User:InternetArchiveBot|'''InternetArchiveBot''']] ([[User talk:InternetArchiveBot|Report bug]]) 10:35, 11 December 2017 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:25, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == Circular argument == "other traditions claiming that the first kagura was danced by a shamaness who was a kami, Ame-no-Uzume, through luring (invoking the presence of) Amaterasu, thereby reenacting the intentions of the kagura as an act of communication to other deities." How can one reenact something that is performed for the first time? The source appears to be misquoted. [[User:Arcsoda|Arcsoda]] ([[User talk:Arcsoda|talk]]) 06:07, 30 October 2025 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:25, 25 February 2026 (UTC)

revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (ja:アメノウズメ, en:Ame-no-Uzume); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text: {{talk page header}} == Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:27, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:25, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-25, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/79370226 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:27, 25 February 2026 (UTC) {{Tmbox|text= *{{Find sources}} *{{Find sources|アメノウズメノミコト}} *{{Find sources|天鈿女命}} *{{Find sources|天宇受賣命}} }} == 「日本最古のコメディアン」について == 最古の踊子という表現はよく見ますが、コメディアンというのは初めて見ました。少々無理があるのではないでしょうか？ "神懸かって舞った"ようなので、"笑いをとろうとした"のではなさそうです。その踊る姿に喝采が贈られ、"祭り（宴会？）の喧噪"に天照大神がさそわれたのではないかと。[[利用者:202.217.10.181|202.217.10.181]] 01:18 2003年3月19日 (UTC) :なるほど。そうかもしれません。思ったとおりに直しといてください。よろしくです。[[利用者:Sutou|Sutou]] 04:08 2003年3月19日 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:27, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-25, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1319507372 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:27, 25 February 2026 (UTC) {{WikiProject banner shell|class=C|1= {{WikiProject Japan|myth=yes|shinto=yes|importance=mid}} {{WikiProject Mythology|importance=mid}} {{WikiProject Women's History|importance=low}} {{WikiProject Women in Religion|importance=low}} }} ==Issues with Description== "The clever Ama-no-Uzume overturned a tub near the cave entrance and began a wild, sexual dance on it, tearing off her clothing in front of the male deities. They considered this so comical that they laughed heartily at the sight. Amaterasu heard them, and asked Ama-no-Uzume what was going on. The dawn goddess replied that the gods had found a better lover than her" I wonder if this is not a bit too much personal embellishment upon the original tale? It seems to over-eroticise the matter, especially as I cannot find any reference to the last sentence, in which it is implied that Ameterasu was a lover to the gods, nor any evidence that Ame-no-Uzume made any such quip. -- [[User:Hidoshi|Hidoshi]] 19:15, 28 September 2005 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:27, 25 February 2026 (UTC) ==Alternate Names== Okame seems to be the name Uzume takes in some theatrical contexts; see [http://www.mfashop.com/533442.html] I have added this reference. --[[User:206.132.50.221|206.132.50.221]] 02:17, 31 December 2006 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:27, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == A striptease?== Would Ame no Uzume's dance qualify as a [[striptease]]? [[Special:Contributions/192.12.88.7|192.12.88.7]] ([[User talk:192.12.88.7|talk]]) 06:48, 12 June 2009 (UTC) :The stripping is there but I see no evidence that it was a "tease" in the form of gradually removing clothes. [[Special:Contributions/192.12.88.7|192.12.88.7]] ([[User talk:192.12.88.7|talk]]) 06:50, 12 June 2009 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:27, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == External links modified == Hello fellow Wikipedians, I have just modified 2 external links on [[Ame-no-Uzume-no-Mikoto]]. Please take a moment to review [[special:diff/814861867|my edit]]. If you have any questions, or need the bot to ignore the links, or the page altogether, please visit [[User:Cyberpower678/FaQs#InternetArchiveBot|this simple FaQ]] for additional information. I made the following changes: *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20140102190934/http://www.city.hamada.shimane.jp/en/kagura/iwato.html to http://www.city.hamada.shimane.jp/en/kagura/iwato.html *Added {{tlx|dead link}} tag to http://www.tsubakishrine.org/contact/TsubakiKoApplication2.pdf *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20041206223721/http://www.nami.it/Glos/AmenoUzume.htm to http://www.nami.it/Glos/AmenoUzume.htm When you have finished reviewing my changes, you may follow the instructions on the template below to fix any issues with the URLs. {{sourcecheck|checked=false|needhelp=}} Cheers.—[[User:InternetArchiveBot|'''InternetArchiveBot''']] ([[User talk:InternetArchiveBot|Report bug]]) 10:35, 11 December 2017 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:27, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == Circular argument == "other traditions claiming that the first kagura was danced by a shamaness who was a kami, Ame-no-Uzume, through luring (invoking the presence of) Amaterasu, thereby reenacting the intentions of the kagura as an act of communication to other deities." How can one reenact something that is performed for the first time? The source appears to be misquoted. [[User:Arcsoda|Arcsoda]] ([[User talk:Arcsoda|talk]]) 06:07, 30 October 2025 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:27, 25 February 2026 (UTC)

revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (ja:アメノウズメ, en:Ame-no-Uzume); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text: {{talk page header}} == Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:41, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:27, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:25, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-25, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/79370226 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:41, 25 February 2026 (UTC) {{Tmbox|text= *{{Find sources}} *{{Find sources|アメノウズメノミコト}} *{{Find sources|天鈿女命}} *{{Find sources|天宇受賣命}} }} == 「日本最古のコメディアン」について == 最古の踊子という表現はよく見ますが、コメディアンというのは初めて見ました。少々無理があるのではないでしょうか？ "神懸かって舞った"ようなので、"笑いをとろうとした"のではなさそうです。その踊る姿に喝采が贈られ、"祭り（宴会？）の喧噪"に天照大神がさそわれたのではないかと。[[利用者:202.217.10.181|202.217.10.181]] 01:18 2003年3月19日 (UTC) :なるほど。そうかもしれません。思ったとおりに直しといてください。よろしくです。[[利用者:Sutou|Sutou]] 04:08 2003年3月19日 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:41, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-25, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1319507372 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:41, 25 February 2026 (UTC) {{WikiProject banner shell|class=C|1= {{WikiProject Japan|myth=yes|shinto=yes|importance=mid}} {{WikiProject Mythology|importance=mid}} {{WikiProject Women's History|importance=low}} {{WikiProject Women in Religion|importance=low}} }} ==Issues with Description== "The clever Ama-no-Uzume overturned a tub near the cave entrance and began a wild, sexual dance on it, tearing off her clothing in front of the male deities. They considered this so comical that they laughed heartily at the sight. Amaterasu heard them, and asked Ama-no-Uzume what was going on. The dawn goddess replied that the gods had found a better lover than her" I wonder if this is not a bit too much personal embellishment upon the original tale? It seems to over-eroticise the matter, especially as I cannot find any reference to the last sentence, in which it is implied that Ameterasu was a lover to the gods, nor any evidence that Ame-no-Uzume made any such quip. -- [[User:Hidoshi|Hidoshi]] 19:15, 28 September 2005 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:41, 25 February 2026 (UTC) ==Alternate Names== Okame seems to be the name Uzume takes in some theatrical contexts; see [http://www.mfashop.com/533442.html] I have added this reference. --[[User:206.132.50.221|206.132.50.221]] 02:17, 31 December 2006 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:41, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == A striptease?== Would Ame no Uzume's dance qualify as a [[striptease]]? [[Special:Contributions/192.12.88.7|192.12.88.7]] ([[User talk:192.12.88.7|talk]]) 06:48, 12 June 2009 (UTC) :The stripping is there but I see no evidence that it was a "tease" in the form of gradually removing clothes. [[Special:Contributions/192.12.88.7|192.12.88.7]] ([[User talk:192.12.88.7|talk]]) 06:50, 12 June 2009 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:41, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == External links modified == Hello fellow Wikipedians, I have just modified 2 external links on [[Ame-no-Uzume-no-Mikoto]]. Please take a moment to review [[special:diff/814861867|my edit]]. If you have any questions, or need the bot to ignore the links, or the page altogether, please visit [[User:Cyberpower678/FaQs#InternetArchiveBot|this simple FaQ]] for additional information. I made the following changes: *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20140102190934/http://www.city.hamada.shimane.jp/en/kagura/iwato.html to http://www.city.hamada.shimane.jp/en/kagura/iwato.html *Added {{tlx|dead link}} tag to http://www.tsubakishrine.org/contact/TsubakiKoApplication2.pdf *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20041206223721/http://www.nami.it/Glos/AmenoUzume.htm to http://www.nami.it/Glos/AmenoUzume.htm When you have finished reviewing my changes, you may follow the instructions on the template below to fix any issues with the URLs. {{sourcecheck|checked=false|needhelp=}} Cheers.—[[User:InternetArchiveBot|'''InternetArchiveBot''']] ([[User talk:InternetArchiveBot|Report bug]]) 10:35, 11 December 2017 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:41, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == Circular argument == "other traditions claiming that the first kagura was danced by a shamaness who was a kami, Ame-no-Uzume, through luring (invoking the presence of) Amaterasu, thereby reenacting the intentions of the kagura as an act of communication to other deities." How can one reenact something that is performed for the first time? The source appears to be misquoted. [[User:Arcsoda|Arcsoda]] ([[User talk:Arcsoda|talk]]) 06:07, 30 October 2025 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:41, 25 February 2026 (UTC)

revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (ja:アメノウズメ, en:Ame-no-Uzume); add local discussion section + dated import note

00:43, 26 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:41, 25 February 2026 by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:25, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/79370226 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:43, 26 February 2026 (UTC) {{Tmbox|text= *{{Find sources}} *{{Find sources|アメノウズメノミコト}} *{{Find sources|天鈿女命}} *{{Find sources|天宇受賣命}} }} == 「日本最古のコメディアン」について == 最古の踊子という表現はよく見ますが、コメディアンというのは初めて見ました。少々無理があるのではないでしょうか？ "神懸かって舞った"ようなので、"笑いをとろうとした"のではなさそうです。その踊る姿に喝采が贈られ、"祭り（宴会？）の喧噪"に天照大神がさそわれたのではないかと。[[利用者:202.217.10.181|202.217.10.181]] 01:18 2003年3月19日 (UTC) :なるほど。そうかもしれません。思ったとおりに直しといてください。よろしくです。[[利用者:Sutou|Sutou]] 04:08 2003年3月19日 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:43, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1319507372 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:43, 26 February 2026 (UTC) {{WikiProject banner shell|class=C|1= {{WikiProject Japan|myth=yes|shinto=yes|importance=mid}} {{WikiProject Mythology|importance=mid}} {{WikiProject Women's History|importance=low}} {{WikiProject Women in Religion|importance=low}} }} ==Issues with Description== "The clever Ama-no-Uzume overturned a tub near the cave entrance and began a wild, sexual dance on it, tearing off her clothing in front of the male deities. They considered this so comical that they laughed heartily at the sight. Amaterasu heard them, and asked Ama-no-Uzume what was going on. The dawn goddess replied that the gods had found a better lover than her" I wonder if this is not a bit too much personal embellishment upon the original tale? It seems to over-eroticise the matter, especially as I cannot find any reference to the last sentence, in which it is implied that Ameterasu was a lover to the gods, nor any evidence that Ame-no-Uzume made any such quip. -- [[User:Hidoshi|Hidoshi]] 19:15, 28 September 2005 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:43, 26 February 2026 (UTC) ==Alternate Names== Okame seems to be the name Uzume takes in some theatrical contexts; see [http://www.mfashop.com/533442.html] I have added this reference. --[[User:206.132.50.221|206.132.50.221]] 02:17, 31 December 2006 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:43, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == A striptease?== Would Ame no Uzume's dance qualify as a [[striptease]]? [[Special:Contributions/192.12.88.7|192.12.88.7]] ([[User talk:192.12.88.7|talk]]) 06:48, 12 June 2009 (UTC) :The stripping is there but I see no evidence that it was a "tease" in the form of gradually removing clothes. [[Special:Contributions/192.12.88.7|192.12.88.7]] ([[User talk:192.12.88.7|talk]]) 06:50, 12 June 2009 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:43, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == External links modified == Hello fellow Wikipedians, I have just modified 2 external links on [[Ame-no-Uzume-no-Mikoto]]. Please take a moment to review [[special:diff/814861867|my edit]]. If you have any questions, or need the bot to ignore the links, or the page altogether, please visit [[User:Cyberpower678/FaQs#InternetArchiveBot|this simple FaQ]] for additional information. I made the following changes: *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20140102190934/http://www.city.hamada.shimane.jp/en/kagura/iwato.html to http://www.city.hamada.shimane.jp/en/kagura/iwato.html *Added {{tlx|dead link}} tag to http://www.tsubakishrine.org/contact/TsubakiKoApplication2.pdf *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20041206223721/http://www.nami.it/Glos/AmenoUzume.htm to http://www.nami.it/Glos/AmenoUzume.htm When you have finished reviewing my changes, you may follow the instructions on the template below to fix any issues with the URLs. {{sourcecheck|checked=false|needhelp=}} Cheers.—[[User:InternetArchiveBot|'''InternetArchiveBot''']] ([[User talk:InternetArchiveBot|Report bug]]) 10:35, 11 December 2017 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:43, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Circular argument == "other traditions claiming that the first kagura was danced by a shamaness who was a kami, Ame-no-Uzume, through luring (invoking the presence of) Amaterasu, thereby reenacting the intentions of the kagura as an act of communication to other deities." How can one reenact something that is performed for the first time? The source appears to be misquoted. [[User:Arcsoda|Arcsoda]] ([[User talk:Arcsoda|talk]]) 06:07, 30 October 2025 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:43, 26 February 2026 (UTC)

{{talk page header}} == Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:43, 26 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:41, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:27, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:25, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/79370226 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:43, 26 February 2026 (UTC) {{Tmbox|text= *{{Find sources}} *{{Find sources|アメノウズメノミコト}} *{{Find sources|天鈿女命}} *{{Find sources|天宇受賣命}} }} == 「日本最古のコメディアン」について == 最古の踊子という表現はよく見ますが、コメディアンというのは初めて見ました。少々無理があるのではないでしょうか？ "神懸かって舞った"ようなので、"笑いをとろうとした"のではなさそうです。その踊る姿に喝采が贈られ、"祭り（宴会？）の喧噪"に天照大神がさそわれたのではないかと。[[User:202.217.10.181|202.217.10.181]] 01:18 2003年3月19日 (UTC) :なるほど。そうかもしれません。思ったとおりに直しといてください。よろしくです。[[User:Sutou|Sutou]] 04:08 2003年3月19日 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:43, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1319507372 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:43, 26 February 2026 (UTC) {{WikiProject banner shell|class=C|1= {{WikiProject Japan|myth=yes|shinto=yes|importance=mid}} {{WikiProject Mythology|importance=mid}} {{WikiProject Women's History|importance=low}} {{WikiProject Women in Religion|importance=low}} }} ==Issues with Description== "The clever Ama-no-Uzume overturned a tub near the cave entrance and began a wild, sexual dance on it, tearing off her clothing in front of the male deities. They considered this so comical that they laughed heartily at the sight. Amaterasu heard them, and asked Ama-no-Uzume what was going on. The dawn goddess replied that the gods had found a better lover than her" I wonder if this is not a bit too much personal embellishment upon the original tale? It seems to over-eroticise the matter, especially as I cannot find any reference to the last sentence, in which it is implied that Ameterasu was a lover to the gods, nor any evidence that Ame-no-Uzume made any such quip. -- [[User:Hidoshi|Hidoshi]] 19:15, 28 September 2005 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:43, 26 February 2026 (UTC) ==Alternate Names== Okame seems to be the name Uzume takes in some theatrical contexts; see [http://www.mfashop.com/533442.html] I have added this reference. --[[User:206.132.50.221|206.132.50.221]] 02:17, 31 December 2006 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:43, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == A striptease?== Would Ame no Uzume's dance qualify as a [[striptease]]? [[Special:Contributions/192.12.88.7|192.12.88.7]] ([[User talk:192.12.88.7|talk]]) 06:48, 12 June 2009 (UTC) :The stripping is there but I see no evidence that it was a "tease" in the form of gradually removing clothes. [[Special:Contributions/192.12.88.7|192.12.88.7]] ([[User talk:192.12.88.7|talk]]) 06:50, 12 June 2009 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:43, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == External links modified == Hello fellow Wikipedians, I have just modified 2 external links on [[Ame-no-Uzume-no-Mikoto]]. Please take a moment to review [[special:diff/814861867|my edit]]. If you have any questions, or need the bot to ignore the links, or the page altogether, please visit [[User:Cyberpower678/FaQs#InternetArchiveBot|this simple FaQ]] for additional information. I made the following changes: *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20140102190934/http://www.city.hamada.shimane.jp/en/kagura/iwato.html to http://www.city.hamada.shimane.jp/en/kagura/iwato.html *Added {{tlx|dead link}} tag to http://www.tsubakishrine.org/contact/TsubakiKoApplication2.pdf *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20041206223721/http://www.nami.it/Glos/AmenoUzume.htm to http://www.nami.it/Glos/AmenoUzume.htm When you have finished reviewing my changes, you may follow the instructions on the template below to fix any issues with the URLs. {{sourcecheck|checked=false|needhelp=}} Cheers.—[[User:InternetArchiveBot|'''InternetArchiveBot''']] ([[User talk:InternetArchiveBot|Report bug]]) 10:35, 11 December 2017 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:43, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Circular argument == "other traditions claiming that the first kagura was danced by a shamaness who was a kami, Ame-no-Uzume, through luring (invoking the presence of) Amaterasu, thereby reenacting the intentions of the kagura as an act of communication to other deities." How can one reenact something that is performed for the first time? The source appears to be misquoted. [[User:Arcsoda|Arcsoda]] ([[User talk:Arcsoda|talk]]) 06:07, 30 October 2025 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:43, 26 February 2026 (UTC)

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] previous contributors were [[User:wikipedia>CycoMa1]], [[User:Immanuelle]], [[User:EmmaBot]], see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Ame-no-Uzume here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{talk page header}} == Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:43, 26 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:41, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:27, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:25, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/79370226 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:43, 26 February 2026 (UTC) {{Tmbox|text= *{{Find sources}} *{{Find sources|アメノウズメノミコト}} *{{Find sources|天鈿女命}} *{{Find sources|天宇受賣命}} }} == 「日本最古のコメディアン」について == 最古の踊子という表現はよく見ますが、コメディアンというのは初めて見ました。少々無理があるのではないでしょうか？ "神懸かって舞った"ようなので、"笑いをとろうとした"のではなさそうです。その踊る姿に喝采が贈られ、"祭り（宴会？）の喧噪"に天照大神がさそわれたのではないかと。[[User:202.217.10.181|202.217.10.181]] 01:18 2003年3月19日 (UTC) :なるほど。そうかもしれません。思ったとおりに直しといてください。よろしくです。[[User:Sutou|Sutou]] 04:08 2003年3月19日 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:43, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1319507372 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:43, 26 February 2026 (UTC) {{WikiProject banner shell|class=C|1= {{WikiProject Japan|myth=yes|shinto=yes|importance=mid}} {{WikiProject Mythology|importance=mid}} {{WikiProject Women's History|importance=low}} {{WikiProject Women in Religion|importance=low}} }} ==Issues with Description== "The clever Ama-no-Uzume overturned a tub near the cave entrance and began a wild, sexual dance on it, tearing off her clothing in front of the male deities. They considered this so comical that they laughed heartily at the sight. Amaterasu heard them, and asked Ama-no-Uzume what was going on. The dawn goddess replied that the gods had found a better lover than her" I wonder if this is not a bit too much personal embellishment upon the original tale? It seems to over-eroticise the matter, especially as I cannot find any reference to the last sentence, in which it is implied that Ameterasu was a lover to the gods, nor any evidence that Ame-no-Uzume made any such quip. -- [[User:Hidoshi|Hidoshi]] 19:15, 28 September 2005 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:43, 26 February 2026 (UTC) ==Alternate Names== Okame seems to be the name Uzume takes in some theatrical contexts; see [http://www.mfashop.com/533442.html] I have added this reference. --[[User:206.132.50.221|206.132.50.221]] 02:17, 31 December 2006 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:43, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == A striptease?== Would Ame no Uzume's dance qualify as a [[striptease]]? [[Special:Contributions/192.12.88.7|192.12.88.7]] ([[User talk:192.12.88.7|talk]]) 06:48, 12 June 2009 (UTC) :The stripping is there but I see no evidence that it was a "tease" in the form of gradually removing clothes. [[Special:Contributions/192.12.88.7|192.12.88.7]] ([[User talk:192.12.88.7|talk]]) 06:50, 12 June 2009 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:43, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == External links modified == Hello fellow Wikipedians, I have just modified 2 external links on [[Ame-no-Uzume-no-Mikoto]]. Please take a moment to review [[special:diff/814861867|my edit]]. If you have any questions, or need the bot to ignore the links, or the page altogether, please visit [[User:Cyberpower678/FaQs#InternetArchiveBot|this simple FaQ]] for additional information. I made the following changes: *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20140102190934/http://www.city.hamada.shimane.jp/en/kagura/iwato.html to http://www.city.hamada.shimane.jp/en/kagura/iwato.html *Added {{tlx|dead link}} tag to http://www.tsubakishrine.org/contact/TsubakiKoApplication2.pdf *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20041206223721/http://www.nami.it/Glos/AmenoUzume.htm to http://www.nami.it/Glos/AmenoUzume.htm When you have finished reviewing my changes, you may follow the instructions on the template below to fix any issues with the URLs. {{sourcecheck|checked=false|needhelp=}} Cheers.—[[User:InternetArchiveBot|'''InternetArchiveBot''']] ([[User talk:InternetArchiveBot|Report bug]]) 10:35, 11 December 2017 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:43, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Circular argument == "other traditions claiming that the first kagura was danced by a shamaness who was a kami, Ame-no-Uzume, through luring (invoking the presence of) Amaterasu, thereby reenacting the intentions of the kagura as an act of communication to other deities." How can one reenact something that is performed for the first time? The source appears to be misquoted. [[User:Arcsoda|Arcsoda]] ([[User talk:Arcsoda|talk]]) 06:07, 30 October 2025 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:43, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
